locations.text: Keep the final summary under 500 words.

enforcement_mechanism.details: Enforcement is two-layered: (1) behavioral instruction in agent prompt, (2) Python truncation logic in the agent result-writing template at stampede-agent.agent.md:222-223 that splits on words, checks len > 500, and truncates with '[truncated]' suffix.
enforcement_mechanism.display_truncation: skills/SKILL.md:620 truncates displayed summaries to 500 chars (UI only); monitor truncates to 60 chars for display

gaps_identified: stampede-merger.agent.md has no word limit on its synthesis/report output
bin/stampede-merge.sh imposes no word cap on merge summaries
No shell-level wc -w validation exists to reject oversized results

verdict: PASS — 500-word limit is consistently defined and enforced via prompt + in-agent truncation logic for workers and commanders. Minor gap: merger agent has no equivalent cap.
